mapper.select: select date_format(ll.login_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, count(distinct ll.member_id) AS loginCount from statistic.login_log ll where ll.login_at between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by date_format(ll.login_at, '%Y-%m') order by month

select date_format(ll.login_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(distinct ll.member_id) as loginCount from statistic.login_log ll where ll.login_at between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by date_format(ll.login_at, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date

select dept.deptName, date_format(ll.login_at, '%Y-%m') as month, count(distinct ll.member_id) as loginCount from statistic.login_log ll join statistic.dept dept on ll.member_id = dept.member_id where ll.login_at between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by dept.deptName, date_format(ll.login_at, '%Y-%m') order by deptName, month
